data.title: Write RED test: brainstorm SKILL.md RESEARCH_FINDINGS ticket comment persistence structural boundary
data.description:
## Story
eaa2-ca1c — PREPLANNING_CONTEXT research compounding across pipeline

## Goal
Write a failing (RED) structural boundary test that validates brainstorm SKILL.md describes persisting research findings as a `RESEARCH_FINDINGS:` prefixed ticket comment, before that addition is made.

## Test File
tests/skills/test-brainstorm-research-findings-persistence.sh

## Test Cases (≥3 required)
1. **test_brainstorm_research_findings_comment_format** — brainstorm SKILL.md mentions `RESEARCH_FINDINGS:` prefixed ticket comment for persisting integration research
2. **test_brainstorm_research_findings_capability_field** — brainstorm SKILL.md describes the `capability` field in the structured researchFindings format
3. **test_brainstorm_research_findings_status_enum** — brainstorm SKILL.md mentions status values (verified/partially_verified/unverified/contradicted) in the research findings format

## Acceptance Criteria
- Test file exists and is executable
- All test cases FAIL before implementation (RED)
- All test cases PASS after implementation (GREEN)
- Follows behavioral-testing-standard.md Rule 5

## .test-index
After creating this file, add entry to .test-index:
  plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md → tests/skills/test-brainstorm-research-findings-persistence.sh [test_brainstorm_research_findings_comment_format]

## Files to Modify
- tests/skills/test-brainstorm-research-findings-persistence.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (UPDATE — add RED marker for brainstorm/SKILL.md)
